steps.content: Strings are sequences of characters. In Lua, we can combine strings using the concatenation operator '..'

steps.instruction: Create two string variables and combine them using the '..' operator:
steps.starterCode:
-- Create two string variables
-- Combine them with ..
-- Print the result
steps.solution:
local firstName = "John"
local lastName = "Doe"
local fullName = firstName .. " " .. lastName
print(fullName)
steps.hint: Use firstName .. " " .. lastName to combine the strings

steps.instruction: Use string.upper() to convert a string to uppercase:
steps.starterCode:
-- Create a string variable
-- Convert it to uppercase
-- Print the result
steps.solution:
local text = "hello world"
local upperText = string.upper(text)
print(upperText)
steps.hint: Use string.upper(yourVariable) to convert to uppercase
